title: saxifraga retusa subsp. augustata
intro: Saxifraga retusa subsp. augustata is a type of alpine plant, commonly known as August Mountain Saxifrage, that belongs to the Saxifragaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. Saxifraga retusa subsp. augustata is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as dried for later use in herbal remedies.
